name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-49
title: tdd-step.py auto-close fix_commit fallback string HEAD will not satisfy commit-sha consumers
description: tdd-step.py auto_close_backlog (lines 132-139) falls back to the literal string 'HEAD' when git rev-parse fails. Then invokes backlog-item-status.py with --fix-commits HEAD. Downstream consumers of fix_commits likely expect a 40-char SHA, not a symbolic ref. The fallback masks the underlying git failure. Better: log an error and skip the close, returning early. (Note: the whole function is dead code per the BUG about missing backlog-item-status.py, but if/when that bug is fixed, this fallback needs revisiting.)
